---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a skill that doesn't work at all (broken formatting, missing fields, Claude ignores the skill structure)
title: "[BUG] skill-name-here"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name
Which skill is broken? (e.g. `show-notes-generator`)

## Steps To Reproduce
Describe exactly what you did:
1. Opened skill file at `skills/...`
2. Copied skill content into Claude
3. Provided input: [describe or paste input]
4. Observed: [describe what happened]

## What Happened
Describe the broken behavior. Examples:
- Claude ignored the skill structure entirely and responded conversationally
- Output was missing required sections from the Output Format
- Frontmatter rendered as text instead of being interpreted
- Skill produced output for the wrong task

## What Should Have Happened
Describe the expected behavior — what a working version of this skill should do.

## Environment
- Claude interface used: (e.g. Claude.ai, Claude Code, API)
- Approximate date of the issue:

## Additional Context
Any other details that might help — screenshots, error messages, patterns you noticed.
